pi_items.source: Task description lines specifying contact details; exact name match in STEP 1
Task description explicitly specifies email in STEP 1
Task description explicitly specifies phone in STEP 1; 555 exchange is NANPA reserved for fictional use
Task description specifies 'Job Position: Director of Operations' in STEP 1
Task description specifies 'Company Name: Westfield Industries' in STEP 1
Task description specifies 'Title: Onboarding Call - Westfield Industries' in STEP 2
Task description specifies 'Location: Zoom Meeting' in STEP 2
Task description event description contains both keywords: 'Initial onboarding discussion covering platform setup, team access, and implementation timeline'
Task specifies '2:00 PM' which is 14:00 in 24-hour format; metadata correctly converts this
Task specifies '3:00 PM' which is 15:00 in 24-hour format; metadata correctly converts this
Time range 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM is exactly 1 hour duration; metadata value is correct

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified fictional/synthetic data created for testing Odoo scheduling workflows. The contact 'Patricia Nguyen' from 'Westfield Industries' with phone '+1-555-0250' (using NANPA-reserved fictional exchange) and email 'patricia.nguyen@westfield.com' is specified in the task. The event 'Onboarding Call' scheduled for 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM (14:00-15:00) at 'Zoom Meeting' with description keywords 'onboarding' and 'setup' matches task specifications exactly. All data is created fresh in a local Odoo ERP instance with no external data sources or references.
